root_text.ud2.5:1.2: ekaṁ samayaṁ bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme.
root_text.ud2.5:1.3: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro icchānaṅgalako upāsako sāvatthiṁ anuppatto hoti kenacideva karaṇīyena.
root_text.ud2.5:1.4: Atha kho so upāsako sāvatthiyaṁ taṁ karaṇīyaṁ tīretvā yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi.
root_text.ud2.5:1.5: Ekamantaṁ nisinnaṁ kho taṁ upāsakaṁ bhagavā etadavoca:
root_text.ud2.5:1.6: “cirassaṁ kho tvaṁ, upāsaka, imaṁ pariyāyamakāsi yadidaṁ idhāgamanāyā”ti.
root_text.ud2.5:2.1: “Cirapaṭikāhaṁ, bhante, bhagavantaṁ dassanāya upasaṅkamitukāmo, api cāhaṁ kehici kehici kiccakaraṇīyehi byāvaṭo. Evāhaṁ nāsakkhiṁ bhagavantaṁ dassanāya upasaṅkamitun”ti.
root_text.ud2.5:3.1: Atha kho bhagavā etamatthaṁ viditvā tāyaṁ velāyaṁ imaṁ udānaṁ udānesi:

translation_text.ud2.5:1.2: At one time the Buddha was staying near Sāvatthī in Jeta’s Grove, Anāthapiṇḍika’s monastery.
translation_text.ud2.5:1.3: Now at that time a certain lay follower from Icchānaṅgalaka arrived at Sāvatthī on some business.
translation_text.ud2.5:1.4: Having concluded his business in Sāvatthī he went to see the Buddha, bowed, and sat down to one side.
translation_text.ud2.5:1.5: The Buddha said this to him:
translation_text.ud2.5:1.6: “It’s been a long time, lay follower, since you took the opportunity to come here.”
translation_text.ud2.5:2.1: “For a long time I’ve wanted to come and see the Buddha, but I wasn’t able, being prevented by my many duties and responsibilities.”
translation_text.ud2.5:3.1: Then, understanding this matter, on that occasion the Buddha expressed this heartfelt sentiment:
translation_text.ud2.5:4.1: “One who has nothing is happy indeed,
translation_text.ud2.5:4.2: a learned person who has appraised the teaching.
translation_text.ud2.5:4.3: See how troubled are those with attachments,
translation_text.ud2.5:4.4: a person bound tight to people.”

reference_text.ud2.5:1.1: bj24.154, cck25.77, csp1ed18.91, csp2ed18.91, mc0.109, ms18Ud_95, msdiv15, pts-vp-pli13
